hebrew: תתק״ל — אדם הראשון מת בשנת תתק״ל, בן תתק״ל שנים; וראו שמונה דורות הנזכרים בחייו.
english: AM 930 — Adam, the first man, died in the year 930, aged 930 years; and in his lifetime the eight generations mentioned above had come forth.
notes: Closes the Creation-to-Adam block of the first millennium. Independent English machine translation.
